scripts.build: npm run build:app && npm run build:questions
scripts.build:questions: QUESTION_ENTRY=questions/customInput/question vite build --config vite.config.questions.js && QUESTION_ENTRY=questions/customInput/scorer vite build --config vite.config.questions.js && QUESTION_ENTRY=questions/multipleOption/question vite build --config vite.config.questions.js && QUESTION_ENTRY=questions/multipleOption/scorer vite build --config vite.config.questions.js
